tasks.name: N3: TX_RX_SW_EXTRACTION SIM- ON Resistance
tasks.description:
task description:
take the cdl\_rc model of tx\_rx switch. Calculate the on-resistance of the tx\_rx switch

1. deliverable: vary the input of the switch (dc- sweep), draw 10uA current from the other end of the switch. Measure the other end voltage. Take the difference between the two end voltages of the switch. Divide the voltage by 10uA will give you the on resistance of the switch.
2. do the sim for 1.8V , 2.2V and 2.5V VBAT
3. do the sim across corner
add the ppt here

Result: [https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/p/shovan/EXONzf9eOiNPjPyF7HMlP50BOCkVhTxw2CgPGdkYGftEbQ?e=gMthhc](https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/p/shovan/EXONzf9eOiNPjPyF7HMlP50BOCkVhTxw2CgPGdkYGftEbQ?e=gMthhc)
tasks.creator: sumon

tasks.name: N3: tx_driver sim with tx_rx_sw
tasks.description:
why: tx\_driver will drive tx\_rx\_switch. need to see the on and off power
deliverable:
1. Measure the current from tx\_driver driving tx\_rx\_sw and rx\_driver stanalone - VBAT, VDD\_AON, VDD\_1P2 (9 MEASUREMNT)
2. measure it across PT and VBAT - 1.6, 1.8, 2.2, AND 2.5 for cload = 0p and 15pF
3. standalone off power - tx\_drive\_en - make it zero . at vbat 2.2V - 15pF,
4. standalone off power - tx\_drive\_en - make it zero . at vbat 2.2V - 15pF, fclk = 0
5. add the result in a ppt.
6. add the result here

Risk : NA
Limitation: NA

Results: [https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/p/shovan/EVZAYMfoAWJBh6ZGYVnXYowBpS51s\_h7hc1DxdQ7Sq4SIQ?e=0lqu2P](https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/p/shovan/EVZAYMfoAWJBh6ZGYVnXYowBpS51s_h7hc1DxdQ7Sq4SIQ?e=0lqu2P)

tasks.name: N3: WIP-Necessary Feature Addition: Transmit Voltage Control from the Chip
tasks.description:
why: need an tx\_io\_ldo to controll the output transmitted voltage
deliverable: design the tx io ldo with the following spec
spec :1.5V to VBAT-0.15V in step of 50mV
 bypass condition - and no power
 internal 200-300pF cap
 max current 5mA
load regulation 20mV
psrr - do not matter

Risk: New module is being added to qs127m.
Limitation: Area in the qs127m top level.
